title: Notification No.39/2004-Cus(NT), dated 25.03.2004
text: 25th March, 2004 Notification No. 39/2004 - Custom (N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Exports), Indira Gandhi International, Airport, New Custom House, New Delhi, to act as Commissioner of Customs (Export), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai, Commissioner of Customs, Mangalore and Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi for the purposes of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s. K.S.Traders and others, issued vide DRI.F.No:50C/11/2003-CI, dated the 30th January, 2004 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence,(Headquarters), New Delhi. D.S.Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India F.NO.437/4/2004-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
